metadata.author: PhysWorldLM Example Generator
metadata.description: Red nation launches a coordinated multi-vector precision missile strike — ballistic missiles, cruise missiles, loitering munitions, and decoy drones — against a Blue airbase complex in semi-desert terrain. Blue responds with a layered integrated air and missile defense (IAMD): AWACS cueing, AN/TPY-2 and AESA ground radars, Patriot PAC-3, NASAMS, CIWS, and fighter interceptors. Demonstrates the complete IAMD kill chain from launch detection through battle damage assessment. Flagship scenario for PhysWorldLM missile and guidance subsystems.

organizations.name: Blue Integrated Air and Missile Defense Command

sensors.name: UHF Phased Array Early Warning Radar

entities.name: Red TEL Alpha — Ballistic Missile Launcher
entities.label: STORM-TEL-A

entities.name: Red TEL Bravo — Cruise Missile Launcher
entities.label: STORM-TEL-B

entities.name: Red TEL Charlie — Loitering Munition / Decoy Launcher
entities.label: STORM-TEL-C

missions.name: Operation Iron Rain — Multi-Vector Strike
missions.primary_objective: Destroy Alpha Airbase runway and fuel depot to deny Blue air operations.
secondary_objectives: Destroy or suppress IAMD radar nodes
Exhaust interceptor magazines via decoy saturation

missions.name: Layered IAMD — Detect, Track, Intercept
missions.primary_objective: Detect all inbound threats; intercept ≥90% of missiles before impact.

missions.name: Battle Damage Assessment
missions.primary_objective: Confirm airbase status, identify battle damage, support repair prioritization.

timeline.label: Simulation starts — AWACS on orbit, radars scanning
Red TEL-A erects MRBM — pre-launch emulation
Red EW activates GPS jammer and DRFM spoofer
TEL-C launches 8 decoy drones to saturate radar picture
TEL-A launches 2 Iskander-M MRBM
UEWR detects MRBM launch plume at 80km apogee
TPY-2 acquires ballistic track — fires cueing data to Patriot Alpha
Threat classification complete — TBM confirmed
Patriot Alpha fires 2x PAC-3 MSE vs first MRBM
Patriot Bravo fires 2x PAC-3 MSE vs second MRBM
Both MRBMs intercepted at 40km altitude — kinetic kill
TEL-B launches 4 cruise missiles — terrain-following mode
AWACS detects cruise missiles at horizon — cues interceptors
Scramble F-35A and F-16C
Scramble F-16C
NASAMS fires 6x AIM-120 at 3 cruise missiles
EW DRFM jammer disrupts NASAMS seeker on one round
3 cruise missiles intercepted by NASAMS; 1 leaker continues
F-35A fires AIM-120D at leaker cruise missile
F-35A intercepts leaker — AIM-120D direct hit
TEL-C launches 6 loitering munitions on airbase
Centurion C-RAM engages loitering munitions at close range
4 loitering munitions killed by C-RAM; 2 break through
Two loitering munitions impact fuel depot — massive fire
Fuel depot destroyed
All Red missiles expended or intercepted — threat neutralized
Begin BDA phase — F-35A overflies base
BDA complete — runway intact, fuel depot destroyed, base operational at 80%
Simulation ends

events.notes: All Blue assets active at sim start
TEL-A begins missile erection sequence — detectable by satellite IR
Red EW activated — GPS jamming L1/L2, DRFM on S/X bands
8 radar decoy drones launched — inflate threat picture
AWACS picks up 8 small targets — classified as possible decoys, possible cruise missiles
2x Iskander-M MRBM fired — depressed trajectory, maneuver blocks
UEWR detects boost phase plume — launch point triangulated to 34.2N 46.8E
TPY-2 locks ballistic tracks — cueing data pushed via Link 16 to Patriot batteries
Threat classification: MRBM confirmed, no decoys; fire authority granted
Patriot Alpha: 2x PAC-3 MSE launched at MRBM-1
Patriot Bravo: 2x PAC-3 MSE launched at MRBM-2
Both MRBMs intercepted kinetically at 40km altitude
4x LACM fired — terrain-following at 30m AGL, TERCOM/DSMAC guidance
AWACS pulse-Doppler picks up 4 low-altitude fast movers — cruise missile profile
AWACS broadcasts threat tracks on Link 16 — scramble order issued
F-35A scrambles — afterburner climb
F-16C scrambles
NASAMS fires 6x AIM-120C at 3 cruise missile tracks (2 shots per target)
Red EW DRFM disrupts AIM-120 seeker on one round — miss
NASAMS kills 3/4 cruise missiles; 1 leaker penetrates engagement zone
F-35A fires AIM-120D at leaker — snap shot from 15km
AIM-120D kills leaker cruise missile 8km from target
6 loitering munitions launched — autonomous seek-and-strike mode
Centurion C-RAM opens up at 2000m — 3000 rpm sustained fire
C-RAM kills 4/6 loitering munitions; 2 defeat terminal defenses
Fuel depot catastrophically destroyed — fireball visible 50km away
Fuel depot destroyed — JP-8 fire, secondary explosions, 3600s burn time
Power failure at sections of airbase — secondary explosion severed grid feed
BDA: runway intact; fuel depot destroyed; IAMD nodes intact; base 80% operational. Blue partial victory — runway defended, fuel depot lost.

views.name: missile_camera_mrbm
views.notes: Mounted on MRBM-1 nose — tracks toward Blue airbase

views.name: interceptor_camera_pac3
views.notes: Seeker-eye view of PAC-3 MSE during intercept

views.name: ground_camera_thermal
views.notes: Co-boresighted IRST — shows missile thermal signature

views.name: blast_overpressure_map
views.notes: 2D overpressure contour map at ground level post-impact
